creator: bcran@FreeBSD.org
text:
The libh project page at http://www.freebsd.org/projects/libh.html is both obsolete and broken: the links to the libh source/info don't work, the libh port was removed and the mailing list hasn't had any traffic since 2005.

How-To-Repeat: Visit http://www.freebsd.org/projects/libh.html and click on the links.
